title: Nutrition Guide for Young Athletes
description: A practical guide on eating well for young basketball players. Covers pre-game meals, hydration, recovery nutrition, and snack ideas for training days.

title: Pre-Game Meal Planner — U14
description: A one-week meal planner designed for teen athletes preparing for competition. Includes breakfast, lunch, dinner and snack options to fuel performance.

title: Hydration for Basketball Players
description: Why hydration matters and how much to drink before, during, and after games and training. Includes tips for hot weather and long tournament days.

title: Mental Skills: Staying Focused Under Pressure
description: Practical techniques for maintaining focus during games and training. Covers breathing exercises, positive self-talk, and visualisation for junior players.

title: Dealing with Mistakes on Court
description: How to bounce back from errors during a game. A mindset guide for young athletes covering resilience, self-compassion, and short memory strategies.

title: Confidence Building for Teen Athletes
description: Strategies to build and maintain confidence across a basketball season. Includes goal-setting frameworks, routine design, and managing pressure.

title: Official Basketball Rules — Junior Summary
description: A simplified breakdown of the key rules of basketball for junior players and their parents. Great reference before your first game or for parents new to the sport.

title: Common Fouls Explained — U14
description: A visual guide to the most common fouls in junior basketball: personal, flagrant, and technical. Includes what referees look for and how to avoid them.

title: At-Home Ball-Handling Program — U12
description: A 4-week at-home dribbling program to improve ball control. No court required — just a ball and some space. Suitable for beginners and intermediates.

title: Shooting Form Video Tutorial
description: Step-by-step video breakdown of proper shooting mechanics. Covers BEEF (Balance, Eyes, Elbow, Follow-through) with slow-motion examples and common mistakes.

title: Speed and Agility Conditioning — U16+
description: Off-court conditioning drills to improve speed, agility, and vertical jump. Designed for senior junior players looking to gain a physical edge.

title: Setting Goals for Your Basketball Season
description: A structured goal-setting workbook for junior players. Includes short-term and long-term goal templates, self-reflection prompts, and review checkpoints.

title: Getting Started with Basketball — U8
description: A beginner-friendly introduction to basketball basics for the youngest players. Covers dribbling, passing, and shooting fundamentals in a fun, approachable format.

title: Dribbling Skills for U10
description: Simple dribbling exercises designed for U10 players to practice at home or in the backyard. Builds coordination and ball control with progressive challenges.

title: Basketball Rules for Parents
description: A friendly guide explaining basketball rules for parents and families who are new to the sport. Helps spectators understand the game and support their young players.
